page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T24 processors running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance allocates exactly one thread per core, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage options for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio position this instance as a stable resource for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance without the overhead of shared-core architectures. It is suited for enterprise applications, web serving, application servers, and medium-sized databases that do not require local storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs and 64 physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9T24 processors running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a dedicated CPU allocation of one thread per core, it provides predictable compute performance. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on external network storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This instance is designed for enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources and a balanced memory profile.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC instance featuring sixty-four physical cores and a balanced memory profile for predictable enterprise workloads.
